since_last: 71% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.32%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 71% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.41% · BTC +1.22% · Gold +1.44% · Nasdaq100 +1.48%. 71% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.32%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.32%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.38%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +10.67%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +10.67%, KLAC +10.65%, AMAT +9.83%, LRCX +9.50%, MU +8.51%. Laggards: AVAV -5.37%, SOUN -3.90%, PLTR -2.80%, CRM -2.63%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.59% at $150.66
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.59% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
